tasks.subject: Plan B Task 1: ConcurrentPool workers daemon=True via initializer
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add `initializer=_mark_thread_daemon` to the `ThreadPoolExecutor` construction in `src/kinoforge/core/pool.py:211-214` so worker threads are `daemon=True` from birth. Cover with 2 unit tests.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/kinoforge/core/pool.py`
- Create: `tests/core/test_pool_workers_daemon.py`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- _mark_thread_daemon helper defined, sets current_thread().daemon=True
- ThreadPoolExecutor gets initializer=_mark_thread_daemon
- 2 unit tests pass
- thread-stack regression 22 green
- test_pool_cancel still green
- ruff + mypy clean

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/core/test_pool_workers_daemon.py -v` → 2 passed in <2 s.

Plan: `docs/superpowers/plans/2026-06-19-pytest-thread-leak-fix-policy-plan-b.md`
Spec: `docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-19-pytest-thread-leak-fix-policy-design.md`
Harvest: `docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-19-pytest-thread-leak-fix-policy-harvest.md`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/pool.py", "tests/core/test_pool_workers_daemon.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/core/test_pool_workers_daemon.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["_mark_thread_daemon helper defined, sets current_thread().daemon=True", "ThreadPoolExecutor gets initializer=_mark_thread_daemon", "2 unit tests pass", "thread-stack regression 22 green", "test_pool_cancel still green", "ruff clean", "mypy clean"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Plan B Task 2: flip L1 to FAIL mode + delete WARN dead code
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Flip `_L1_MODE` to `"fail"`, delete `_l1_append_warn` + WARN branch from hookwrapper, remove `.gitignore` inventory line, delete inventory file, prune 2 WARN-mode tests from `tests/test_l1_thread_policy.py`.

**Files:**
- Modify: `tests/conftest.py`
- Modify: `.gitignore`
- Delete: `tests/_l1_leakers_inventory.txt`
- Modify: `tests/test_l1_thread_policy.py`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- _L1_MODE=fail in conftest
- _l1_append_warn deleted + WARN branch deleted from hookwrapper
- gitignore inventory line removed
- inventory file deleted from working tree
- test_l1_thread_policy.py down to 6 tests
- L1 unit tests pass
- thread-stack regression green
- scoped suite re-run produces zero L1 thread-leak policy ERROR lines
- ruff + mypy clean

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/test_l1_thread_policy.py -v` → 6 passed in <2 s.

Plan: `docs/superpowers/plans/2026-06-19-pytest-thread-leak-fix-policy-plan-b.md`
Spec: `docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-19-pytest-thread-leak-fix-policy-design.md`
